stories.title: LaMelo Ball traded to Minnesota! Which team gets a...
stories.summary: We're grading the biggest NBA trades of the offseason, including the blockbuster deal that sent LaMelo Ball from Charlotte to Minnesota.

stories.title: Copy of Sources: Hornets' Ball to Wolves for Reid, picks
stories.summary: The Hornets are trading star guard LaMelo Ball and Josh Green to the Timberwolves for Naz Reid and a series of draft picks, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: White plans to re-sign with Hornets, sources say
stories.summary: Guard Coby White intends to sign a three-year, $74 million deal to return to the Hornets, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Sources: Celtics still actively talking Brown trad...
stories.summary: The Celtics remain actively engaged in trade talks to move Jaylen Brown, with multiple teams interested in acquiring the All-Star forward, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: QB Williams' attempt to trademark 'Iceman' denied
stories.summary: The United States Patent and Trademark Office has initially refused Caleb Williams' application for "Iceman," according to USPTO records.
